title: How AI is Changing B2B Demand Gen in 2026
speaker: Benny Bridger, Marketing Consultant
description: A practical session on how B2B marketers are using AI to automate campaign execution, personalize outreach at scale, and build systems that compound intelligence over time.
key_takeaways: The 3 marketing workflows most ready for AI automation today
How to build a webinar launch system that runs itself
Where human judgment still matters (and where it doesn't)
target_pain_point: Marketing teams are drowning in manual execution work that AI could handle, but they don't know where to start or how to build the systems.
cta_customers: Join us for an exclusive look at what's working
cta_prospects: See how leading B2B teams are automating their pipeline
